dungeon.jp: 飛天の塔【ベリーハード】1階

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Marked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>標的</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>표식</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>标记</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks a single enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> chance to activate a <color=#28d9ed>Dual Attack</color> from the ally with the highest Attack.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>連携</color>を発生させる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> 확률로 가장 공격력이 높은 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>협공</color>을 발생시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>的几率使攻击力最高的友军发动<color=#28d9ed>夹攻</color>。

name.jp: クマさんを捕まえるアロー

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 적의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使敌人<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
